explanations.pt-br: Importamos transformers, pipeline e torch para a comparação.
explanations.en-us: We import transformers, pipeline and torch for the comparison.

explanations.pt-br: Lista de formatos para comparar: FP16 (sem config) e NF4.
explanations.en-us: List of formats to compare: FP16 (no config) and NF4.

explanations.pt-br: Loop: carrega cada formato, gera texto e imprime o resultado.
explanations.en-us: Loop: loads each format, generates text and prints the result.

explanations.pt-br: FP16 usa `torch_dtype`, NF4 usa `quantization_config`. Ambos com `device_map='auto'`.
explanations.en-us: FP16 uses `torch_dtype`, NF4 uses `quantization_config`. Both with `device_map='auto'`.
